body:
## Evidence
- This is a lockfile-only dependency update (`uv.lock`) from cryptography 46.0.6 to 46.0.7.
- Security fix covered: CVE-2026-39892 (non-contiguous buffer handling/buffer overflow risk).
- Validation: dependency resolution/build pipeline checks passed and no application/runtime code paths were changed.

- Manual evidence artifact requirement: no UI interaction changes; runtime behavior unaffected. (security dependency-only update)
title: chore(deps): bump cryptography from 46.0.6 to 46.0.7
